_comment: Phase 0 artifact: the authoritative content plan for one deck. Author this BEFORE building. Each slide entry: n (1-based), archetype (A1-A11, see SLIDE_BLUEPRINTS.md), title, blocks (free-form per archetype -- mirror the archetype's structure), citations (exact strings that must appear on the slide), source_anchor (heading or unique phrase in the source .md that this slide's content comes from, for traceability), notes_brief (1-2 lines the speaker script should cover). Rules: open with A1, close with A11, never two adjacent slides with the same archetype, aim for one A3 stat and one A5 matrix per module where content supports it. Every stat must be copied VERBATIM from the source and carry a citation. No double-quotes inside string values. ENFORCED: verify_deck.py --outline checks slide count, per-slide title presence, and per-slide citation strings as HARD failures, and reads citation_style (numbered decks get a --refmap reminder).
